title: Pulsed Dawn
description: A QoL Performance & Visuality enhancement modpack. Simplicity Arched but visuals are cared about.
body:
# Pulsed Dawn

## Description
Introducing Pulsed Dawn: A QoL Performance & Visuality Enhancement Modpack

Step into the dawn of a new era with Pulsed Dawn, a modpack that combines the best of both worlds: simplicity and visual excellence. This carefully crafted collection of mods optimizes your Minecraft experience, delivering improved performance, stunning visuals, and a streamlined gameplay experience.

<details>
<summary>✨Mods Used</summary>

## FAQ
### ❔What is Pulsed Dawn modpack?
  
- Pulsed Dawn is a modpack designed to enhance QoL experiences and balance the nature of Performance and visual quality, This modpack is the QoL branch of Simplicity arched (SA) which  helps only performance.

  
### 👎Will using this modpack affect my gameplay experience negatively in any way?

- While the modpack is designed to enhance performance and visual quality, individual experiences may vary depending on factors such as hardware specifications and compatibility with other mods on the client that are not in the modpack.

## Other
A huge thanks to the modrinth team and the adrinth team for upkeeping this webstite and to the people who made the mods in this modpack. This modpack had a lot of testing to make sure its a perfect QoL modpack.
